items.summary: Removed the sequencing and terminal-artifact contradictions by making normalized-request/source-manifest write once in Step 1, narrowing Step 3 to verify that single write point and declared consistency checks, and aligning Step 5, <outputs>, and <completion> to one terminal artifact model with arbitration_used-based exclusivity.
Changed cross-round negotiation from conceptual-group keyed carry-forward to finding-ID keyed carry-forward, while keeping conceptual_group ID only as grouping context in fix-items evidence.
Made <scope> the single canonical exclusion boundary and replaced the duplicated authority exclusion list with a reference back to that canonical scope list.
Resolved the normalized-request/source-manifest timing conflict by treating preconditions as validation only and Step 1 as the sole write point everywhere the artifacts are declared.
